- subroutines.start_task_packet: S2: Create task packet with AC/risks/path/checkpoints.
- subroutines.init_registries: S1: Initialize risk/uncertainty/blocker registries.
- subroutines.record_finding_strict: S1: Evidence-backed finding capture.
- subroutines.record_decision_strict: S1: Decision capture with irreversible safeguards.
- subroutines.record_uncertainty: S1: Log unresolved question and owner.
- subroutines.build_task_graph: S2: Build DAG + critical path from tasks/dependencies.
- subroutines.next_best_action: S2: Select next runnable node.
- subroutines.run_checkpoint: S1: Execute forcing checkpoint gate.
- subroutines.verify_ac: S2: Verify acceptance criteria convergence.
- subroutines.false_win_scan: S2: Check false-win risks mitigated.
- subroutines.pressure_check: S2: Periodic convergence/unknowns drift check.
- subroutines.open_blocker_issue: S1: Externalize hard blocker to issues/active path.
- subroutines.propose_followup_issue: S1: Propose non-blocking followup issue.
- subroutines.context_trim_plan: S2: Compute evict/retain set for context pressure.
- subroutines.close_task_with_tax: S3: Final close gate requiring AC proof + knowledge tax.
- subroutines.promote_l2_to_l3: S2: Promote validated L2 entries to L3 memory.
- subroutines.spec: Work-item spec operations: init, ready, append_invariant, append_scenario, link_issue.
- subroutines.safe_edit: Only allowed source edit path; recorded transaction with logs.json lock semantics.
- subroutines.safe_write: Only allowed full-file write path; records finalized write transaction with logs.json lock semantics.
- subroutines.audit_change_ledger: Synchronous Verify/Audit check for unlogged edits + stale verification mappings.
- core.wip: Workspace orchestration tool (init/clone/status/abort)
